/mc.title: Cloudsail - Minecraft Server
/mc.description: The Cloudsail Project provides free, secure, and reliable cloud infrastructure to gaming, engineering, historical, and educational communities worldwide.
h2: It's easy to join.It's fun for everyone.
p: Many public Minecraft servers are horrible. They exploit children and families through their pay-to-win nature and some lack moderation. We were tired of that. So we created our own.

This server is completely free to everyone, and like all Cloudsail services, is funded by generous donors worldwide. Our servers provide premium performance, low latency, and a high quality community experience. This server is moderated 24/7 for enhanced safety.
Want to join? Enter the following details!
A modern, innovative Java server. Available on Versions 1.9+

/legal/privacy.title: Cloudsail - Private Cloud Infrastructure
/legal/privacy.description: The Cloudsail Project provides free, secure, and reliable cloud infrastructure to gaming, engineering, historical, and educational communities worldwide.
p: We collect specific information to operate our infrastructure, provide secure game servers, and maintain community standards. This includes:
Automatically Collected Data: When you connect to our servers or websites, we automatically log your IP address, in-game username, chat history, and server actions.
Donation Information: If you choose to donate, we collect your email address, name, and Minecraft username to assign digital perks.
To protect our network and monitor performance, we utilize specific web tools.

Consent Management: We use Osano as our Consent Management Platform (CMP). When you visit our website, Osano allows you to opt-in or opt-out of non-essential cookies. (Note: Webmaster tools such as Google Search Console are utilized strictly for backend search performance and do not deploy tracking cookies on end-user browsers).

Essential Cookies: Cloudflare utilizes strictly necessary security cookies (such as __cf_bm) to protect our network architecture and reverse proxies from malicious bot traffic and DDoS attacks. These essential cookies cannot be disabled, as they are required for the safe operation of our infrastructure.
The Cloudsail Project does not directly collect, process, or store your credit card or financial information.
All financial transactions are securely handled by our fiscal sponsor, the Hack Foundation (HCB), and processed via Stripe.

Financial Transparency: We practice Privacy by Design. Donor identities can be kept private should you choose, given you check the appropriate box. Donors must explicitly opt-out during checkout if they wish to have their name and donation amount removed from our public financial ledger. Note: This setting is managed by our bank (HCB).
4. Data Storage, Security, and Cross-Border Transfers

We take the security of your data seriously. Our game servers and databases are hosted in the United States (US West region). By accessing our services, international users acknowledge and consent to their data being transferred to, stored, and processed in the United States.
Access Controls: Administrative access to our infrastructure is protected by strict access controls, including Cloudflare Zero Trust authentication, reverse proxies, and restricted panel access.

IP Masking: Within our standard administrative consoles, user IP addresses are redacted to prevent abuse by lower-level moderators. While masked for general moderation, these addresses remain accessible to senior administrators strictly for security enforcement.
5. Data Retention, Anti-Cheat, and Human Appeal
To protect the integrity of our community, IP addresses and server action logs are retained within our backend files.

Retention Period: Data required for network security and automated anti-cheat systems is retained for the active duration of the ban, or for the functional lifespan of the underlying infrastructure, to permanently enforce IP-based bans against malicious actors and prevent ban evasion.

Automated Decision-Making: Users subject to automated disciplinary actions (such as IP-based anti-cheat bans) have the right to request a manual human review or appeal the decision by contacting our administrative team.
6. Children and Minors We are committed to protecting the privacy of minors.

Under 13: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13. If we discover we have inadvertently collected data from a user under 13, we will delete that information immediately.

Ages 13-17: Users between the ages of 13 and 17 may only access our infrastructure and make financial contributions with the explicit, verifiable consent of a parent or legal guardian. This consent is verified implicitly when a parent or guardian utilizes their payment method via Stripe to process a donation, or explicitly via a mandatory acknowledgment checkbox during account registration.

Depending on your geographic location (such as the UK, the European Union, or applicable US states), you may have specific legal rights regarding your personal data, including the right to request access to or deletion of your information.
We comply with verifiable data subject access requests (DSARs) originating from jurisdictions where such rights are legally guaranteed.

Security Exemption: We legally reserve the right to deny deletion requests for specific technical information—such as IP addresses and hardware identifiers—when that data is actively required to enforce server bans, maintain anti-cheat systems, and protect infrastructure security.
We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data. We only share information with trusted third-party services necessary to operate Cloudsail, including:
Infrastructure & Analytics: Cloudflare, Google, and Osano.
Payment Processing: Hack Foundation (HCB) and Stripe.
Legal Compliance: We will disclose logged data to legal authorities if required by law, or to protect the safety, property, and rights of The Cloudsail Project, our infrastructure, and our users.
If you wish to exercise your data rights, appeal an automated decision, or have questions about our privacy practices, please contact our administrative team via:
© 2026 The Cloudsail Project. All Rights Reserved.

/legal/terms-and-conditions.title: Cloudsail - Privacy Policy
/legal/terms-and-conditions.description: The Cloudsail Project provides free, secure, and reliable cloud infrastructure to gaming, engineering, historical, and educational communities worldwide.
p: The Cloudsail Project - Terms of Use
1. Acceptance of Terms and Privacy Policy

By accessing or using any services, servers, or websites provided by The Cloudsail Project ("Cloudsail," "we," "us," or "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). These Terms expressly incorporate our Privacy Policy by reference. If you do not agree to all terms and conditions, you may not access our services. We reserve the right to update these Terms; however, we will provide reasonable notice of any material changes via an announcement on our official Discord server or a website banner. Your continued use of the services following such notice constitutes your acceptance of the changes.

You must be at least 13 years of age to access or use our services. By using Cloudsail, you represent and warrant that you meet this requirement. If you are between the ages of 13 and 17, you must have the legal consent of your parent or guardian to accept these Terms and to make any financial contributions or donations.
Cloudsail provides public-facing game servers, cloud infrastructure, and community platforms. All services are provided strictly on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis.
No Service Level Agreement (SLA): We do not guarantee continuous, uninterrupted, or secure access to our servers.
Data Loss: We are not responsible for lost server progress, corrupted files, downtime, or scheduled/unscheduled maintenance. You use the infrastructure entirely at your own risk.
4. Donations, Digital Goods, and Fiscal Sponsorship
The Cloudsail Project operates as a fiscally sponsored project of the Hack Foundation, a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Our infrastructure is funded through voluntary user donations.

Perks and Ranks: Donors may receive digital cosmetic ranks or in-game perks as a gesture of appreciation. These perks are delivered via an automated API system. We do not guarantee immediate delivery in the event of technical outages.

Fair Market Value & Tax Deductibility: Under IRS regulations, the tax-deductible amount of your contribution is limited to the excess of the donation over the fair market value of any goods or services received in exchange. Digital cosmetic ranks hold no real-world financial value.
No Pay-to-Win: Perks provide no competitive advantage in-game.

Refund Policy: All donations are final, non-refundable, and non-transferable. Chargebacks or payment disputes will result in an immediate, permanent ban from all Cloudsail services and infrastructure.
The Cloudsail Project is an independent organization. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, maintained by, or supported by Microsoft Corporation, Mojang AB, or Team Cherry.

By accessing our servers, you acknowledge and agree to comply with the respective End User License Agreements (EULAs) and Terms of Service of the underlying software, including but not limited to the Minecraft EULA.
Any registered trademarks used on our platforms are the property of their respective owners.

While you retain the underlying copyright to original structures, builds, or modifications you create within the Cloudsail game servers, by building on our platforms, you grant The Cloudsail Project a broad, irrevocable, royalty-free, worldwide license to host, display, modify, and distribute your creations within the server environment.
If your access is revoked or terminated, you forfeit any right to access, export, or demand the deletion of your in-game content.
We reserve the right to retain, modify, delete, or use screenshots and videos of user-generated content for promotional or administrative purposes.

You are strictly and solely responsible for all activity that occurs under your account and originating from your IP address. We enforce server rules via IP and account-based bans. We do not entertain appeals based on claims that an account or network was accessed by a sibling, friend, or unauthorized third party. It is your responsibility to secure your own network and account credentials.

IN NO EVENT SHALL THE CLOUDSAIL PROJECT, ITS DIRECTORS, ADMINISTRATORS, OR VOLUNTEERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, PUNITIVE, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH YOUR USE OF OUR INFRASTRUCTURE OR SERVICES.
This includes, without limitation, damages for loss of data, loss of in-game progress, server downtime, unauthorized access to your account, or actions taken by other users.

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless The Cloudsail Project from any claims, liabilities, damages, or expenses (including legal fees) arising from your violation of these Terms or your misuse of the services.

Access to Cloudsail infrastructure is a privilege, not a right. We reserve the absolute right to suspend, terminate, or permanently revoke your access to any and all Cloudsail services, game servers, and community platforms at our sole discretion, at any time, and for any reason, without prior notice or liability.
10. Governing Law, Jurisdiction, and Hybrid Disputes

These Terms of Service, and any disputes arising from your use of The Cloudsail Project's infrastructure, game servers, or community platforms, shall be governed by the laws of the State of Arizona. Any legal action regarding infrastructure usage or moderation decisions shall be brought exclusively in Arizona.

Financial Transactions: All financial donations, tax-deductible contributions, and payment processing are governed by the Terms of Service and legal jurisdiction of the Hack Foundation and its payment processors.

Hybrid Disputes: In the event a dispute involves both a financial transaction and infrastructure access (e.g., an account ban resulting from a payment chargeback), matters pertaining to the revocation of server access shall remain exclusively under Arizona jurisdiction, while the financial mechanics of the transaction remain under the Hack Foundation's jurisdiction.
If you have any questions, concerns, or need to discuss these boundaries further, you may contact our administrative team via:

/.title: Cloudsail | Nonprofit Cloud Infrastructure
/.description: The Cloudsail Project provides free, secure, and reliable cloud infrastructure to gaming, engineering, historical, and educational communities worldwide.
h4: Hi! We're The Cloudsail Project (aka Cloudsail), a fiscally sponsored 501(c)(3) nonprofit uplifting the tech communities that need it most.
We're built to empower everyone. We give everyone the ability and resources to focus on what matters: building, learning, and having as much fun as possible. Here's how we help:

At Cloudsail, we're disappointed when servers introduce pay-to-win and exploitative practictices. Our servers give everyone an equal and fair chance to win. We rely on community support, so donations/ranks are purely cosmetic.
If it's Cloudsail, it's built by us. Our senior leadership team is responsible for making sure anything involving Cloudsail is perfect. SRE just got serious.

Owen specializes in content creation. His YouTube channel has over 250 subscribers and is quickly growing. His dedication to creating high-quality content makes him the perfect fit for marketing, promotional videos, and posts.Outside of Cloudsail, Owen loves gaming, professional editiing in Adobe Premiere Pro, and loves theater.  He also runs a rapidly growing YouTube channel.

Riley, the Director of Server Config and Optimization, ensures that Cloudsail servers are equipped with the latest and most effective features. His work has created a more inclusive server environment with reduced waste. Outside of Cloudsail, he is passionate about video editing in DaVinci Resolve and understanding what makes a video perfect. He's not into social media and decided his contact links should be a joke instead.

Theo, our Director of Safety and Moderation, is dedicated to maintaining a safe and welcoming environment for all users on our servers. He's always upbeat and making jokes. When he's not moderating, Theo enjoys coding and development, particularly interested in understanding backend systems. He's pursuing a career in tech.

Colton is the owner and founder of The Cloudsail Project. He's responsible for server uptime, troubleshooting, engineering, and more. Beyond Cloudsail, Colton enjoys tackling other networking projects and pursues his passion for engineering.
We don't believe in hidden fees, data harvesting, or pay-to-win. That makes it surprisingly easy to be transparent.
I love this organization! How can I help?
p: Here’s a fact that people recognize but don’t act upon: the internet is a dangerous place. Unfortunately, that extends to public gaming servers that many kids and teens play. At Cloudsail, we build free, safe, and moderated digital servers that are free from the scammy, exploitative practices employed by other servers.
A low-latency community server for Hollow Knight fans.
A modern, innovative economy server. Available on Versions 1.9+ (1.21.11 preferred).
The only place to get updates, support, and epic community chats.
